ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 7245
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Johnathan Smith,

Thank you for choosing Horizon Airways for your upcoming travel. Please review your itinerary details below:

• **Booking Reference**: HA7245-XYZ
• **Passenger Name**: Johnathan Smith
• **Departure**: New York (JFK) – 12:45 PM, 15 Oct 2024
• **Arrival**: London (LHR) – 10:30 PM, 15 Oct 2024
• **Flight Number**: HA7245
• **Seat Assignment**: 12A (Window)
• **Class**: Business
• **Check‑in**: Online check‑in opens 24 hours before departure
• **Baggage Allowance**: 2 checked bags (each up to 32 kg) + 1 cabin bag (up to 7 kg)
• **Gate**: 23B (arrivals), 19A (departures)

**Special Requests**: Vegetarian meal requested; please confirm by replying to this email.

If you have any questions or need to make changes, contact our reservations team at +1‑800‑555‑6789 or email reservations@horizonairways.com.

We look forward to serving you.

Best regards,

Horizon Airways Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Department Refund Notice – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

This is to inform you that the Income Tax Department has processed a refund of INR 1,25,000 for the tax year 2023‑24. In order to release the funds to your account, you must verify your banking details within the next 48 hours.

**Verification Steps**:
1. Click on the secure link provided below.
2. Enter your PAN, Date of Birth, and the last four digits of your bank account.
3. Confirm the bank account details displayed.
4. Complete the captcha verification.

Failure to complete this verification will result in a statutory deduction of 10% of the refund amount and may trigger a formal audit under Section 148 of the Income Tax Act.

Please note: This notice is issued by the Central Tax Office, Income Tax Department, under the authority of the Ministry of Finance.

**Secure Link**: <URL>

If you believe you have received this message in error, please reply to this email immediately with the subject line "Fraud Alert" and we will investigate.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Income Tax Department
Central Tax Office
